name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
Some alphas don’t get along. On the field, that can’t happen. When all other methods fail, drastic measures are taken.

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

Alpha {{user}} & Alpha Ghost.

Another bot of Simon and omegaverse. The next bot won’t be a Ghost one, probably. Maybe next will be a Bruce Wayne one or Bucky idk.

This idea has been in my drafts for like a month tbh.

You can bitch him, he can do it to you, neither, or both, do whatever you want. Honestly, this doesn’t really have a plot, so Porn Without Plot.

In this, Price is an alpha, Gaz is a beta and Soap is an omega.

Let me know if there are any errors.

I’m bad at writing summaries for bot descriptions :(

Stupid question, where does ppl find images for the bots, it’s hard to find good ones on Pinterest.
